rule_metadata.name: Android_Copy9
rule_metadata.author: Jacob Soo Lead Re
rule_metadata.description: This rule try to detect commercial spyware from Copy9

rules.rule_text:
import "androguard"

rule Android_Copy9
{
	meta:
		author = "Jacob Soo Lead Re"
		date = "06-June-2016"
		description = "This rule try to detect commercial spyware from Copy9"
		source = "http://copy9.com/"

	condition:
		androguard.service( /com.ispyoo/i ) and androguard.receiver ( /com.ispyoo/i )
}
